story.text:
# ✨ Vault Publish
**🪞(curated) → 🌐(publish) → 🖼️(public)**
*aria_silverhue · vault · V57*

Publish from the Curatrix Vault to the public layer. The publication carries the curatorial discipline with it.

> Publication from the vault is not the vault opening. It is the vault sending an envoy.

*Keywords:* publish · vault · public · v57
